summary: CI failed during package build: C/C++ compilation errors in a pandas SIMD header caused package metadata generation to fail and the job to exit with code 1.
root_cause: C++ compilation errors in ../../pandas/_libs/include/pandas/simd/moments_simd.hpp (around line 255) caused metadata generation to fail during the build.

evidence.reason: Shows the compiler emitted an error pointing to the SIMD header file and a specific location (line 255).
Indicates the compiler produced errors during compilation.
The build step that generates package metadata failed, which is commonly caused by compile errors in extension modules.
Shows the build subprocess failed, consistent with compilation failing during wheel/metadata generation.

evidence.quote: Encountered error while generating package metadata.
evidence.reason: Direct statement that metadata generation failed as a result of the preceding errors.
Indicates the project uses meson for setup/build; the compilation failure happened during this build setup/process.
The job ended with a non-zero exit code after the build errors.

suggested_fix: Inspect and fix the C++ compilation errors in ../../pandas/_libs/include/pandas/simd/moments_simd.hpp near line 255, then rerun the build (meson setup / build) on CI. Reproduce the compiler errors locally or on the runner to get the full diagnostics and adjust code or compiler flags accordingly.
